icp_criteria.description: The Ideal Customer Profile definition used to drive search filters.

employee_count_min.description: Minimum employee count for ICP fit.

employee_count_max.description: Maximum employee count for ICP fit.

technographic_signals.description: Technologies the target companies should be using (e.g., ['Salesforce', 'HubSpot']).

target_count.description: Target number of companies to include in the final list.

exclude_existing_customers.description: If true, exclude companies already in CRM as active customers.

geographic_filter.description: Optional geographic constraint (e.g., 'United States', 'New York metro', 'EMEA').

additional_filters.description: Any extra filters not covered by the main ICP criteria (e.g., job posting keywords, recent growth signals).
